mapper.sql: select order_id, order_no, user_id, user_phone, goods_id, goods_name, goods_cover, goods_type, quantity,dept_id,parent_id, points_used, status, consignee, phone, address, express_company, express_no, ship_time, finish_time, close_reason, close_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from t_order
mapper.insert: insert into t_order(order_no, user_id, user_phone, goods_id, goods_name, goods_cover, goods_type, quantity,dept_id,parent_id, points_used, status, consignee, phone, address, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{userPhone}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsName}, #{goodsCover}, #{goodsType}, #{quantity}, #{deptId},#{parentId},#{pointsUsed}, '0', #{consignee}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update t_order set status='1', express_company=#{expressCompany}, express_no=#{expressNo}, ship_time=sysdate(), update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where order_id=#{orderId} and status='0'
update t_order set status='3', close_reason=#{reason}, close_time=sysdate(), update_time=sysdate() where order_id=#{orderId} and status in ('0','1')
update t_order set status='2', finish_time=sysdate(), update_time=sysdate() where order_id=#{orderId} and user_id=#{userId} and status='1'
